# Issue #42: Add user authentication

Parent: https://github.com/acme/app/issues/10
Type/Priority/Scope: enhancement, priority:high
Base branch: origin/main

## Context

The app currently has no authentication. Users can access all routes without logging in. This issue adds session-based auth with login/logout endpoints.

## Assumptions Made

- Assuming bcrypt for password hashing because the project already has it as a dependency
- Assuming cookie-based sessions rather than JWT because the app is server-rendered

## Implementation Plan

```json
{
  "finish_issue_on_complete": true,
  "steps": [
    {
      "id": "S001",
      "title": "Add user model and migration",
      "status": "pending",
      "done_when": "User table exists with email, password_hash columns; model exported",
      "depends_on": [],
      "files": ["src/models/user.ts", "src/migrations/001-create-users.sql"],
      "tasks": [
        "Create User model in src/models/user.ts with email and password_hash fields",
        "Add migration file for users table",
        "Export from src/models/index.ts"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "S002",
      "title": "Add auth middleware",
      "status": "pending",
      "done_when": "Protected routes return 401 without valid session",
      "depends_on": ["S001"],
      "files": ["src/middleware/auth.ts", "src/middleware/index.ts"],
      "tasks": [
        "Create requireAuth middleware in src/middleware/auth.ts",
        "Wire into route definitions"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "S003",
      "title": "Add login and logout endpoints",
      "status": "pending",
      "done_when": "POST /login returns session cookie; POST /logout clears it; tests pass",
      "depends_on": ["S001", "S002"],
      "files": ["src/routes/auth.ts", "src/__tests__/auth.test.ts"],
      "tasks": [
        "Add POST /login endpoint with credential validation",
        "Add POST /logout endpoint to destroy session",
        "Add tests covering happy path, bad credentials, and logout"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## Files to Modify

**S001:** src/models/user.ts, src/migrations/001-create-users.sql, src/models/index.ts
**S002:** src/middleware/auth.ts, src/middleware/index.ts
**S003:** src/routes/auth.ts, src/__tests__/auth.test.ts

## Documentation & Discoverability

- [ ] CHANGELOG entry (under appropriate version section)
- [ ] README update (if new command, setting, or feature)
- [ ] Any project-specific integration points (entry points, config, menus, keybindings)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Users can log in with email/password
- [ ] Protected routes require authentication
- [ ] Logout destroys the session
